---
title: "Reference"
---

These pages contain the test models, node descriptions and Ribasim Python API documentation.

## Node types

### Waterbody

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/Basin.svg){height=80}<br>Basin](node/basin.qmd)

:::

### Connector

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/TabulatedRatingCurve.svg){height=80}<br>TabulatedRatingCurve](node/tabulated-rating-curve.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/Outlet.svg){height=80}<br>Outlet](node/outlet.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/Pump.svg){height=80}<br>Pump](node/pump.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/LinearResistance.svg){height=80}<br>LinearResistance](node/linear-resistance.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/ManningResistance.svg){height=80}<br>ManningResistance](node/manning-resistance.qmd)

&nbsp;

:::

### Boundary

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/FlowBoundary.svg){height=80}<br>FlowBoundary](node/flow-boundary.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/LevelBoundary.svg){height=80}<br>LevelBoundary](node/level-boundary.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/Terminal.svg){height=80}<br>Terminal](node/terminal.qmd)

:::

### Demand

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/UserDemand.svg){height=80}<br>UserDemand](node/user-demand.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/FlowDemand.svg){height=80}<br>FlowDemand](node/flow-demand.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/LevelDemand.svg){height=80}<br>LevelDemand](node/level-demand.qmd)

:::

### Control

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/DiscreteControl.svg){height=80}<br>DiscreteControl](node/discrete-control.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/ContinuousControl.svg){height=80}<br>ContinuousControl](node/continuous-control.qmd)

[![](/assets/node-icons/PidControl.svg){height=80}<br>PidControl](node/pid-control.qmd)

:::

### Layout

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}

[![](/assets/node-icons/Junction.svg){height=80}<br>Junction](node/junction.qmd)

:::
